title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.315 - Department may become payee for patient, procedure
text:
630.315.  Department may become payee for patient, procedure. — A department residential facility may accept an appointment to serve as representative payee or fiduciary, or in a similar capacity for payments to a patient or resident under a public or private benefit arrangement.  Funds so received shall be governed by section 630.305, except to the extent that laws or regulations governing payment of the benefits provide otherwise.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
